case_title: DIANA CHOW VS. A&M FOX LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOW, DIANA AS TO DEFENDANT A&M FOX LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SOURCE RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHOW, DIANA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A&M FOX LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA SOURCE RESTAURANT $5,897.74 PRINCIPAL, $8.30 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,131.04, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
